title: SSI RPX Record (Reflective Provenance Extension)
description: Canonical schema for SSI decision audit records. Defines the normative format for tamper-evident decision provenance as specified in SPEC.md and AUDIT.md. v2.1 introduces explicit receipt versioning and additive forward-compatibility per docs/protocol/RECEIPT_EVOLUTION.md.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this decision record. MUST be globally unique within the system.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (UTC) when decision was evaluated. MUST use RFC 3339 format with microsecond precision.

previous_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous record in the chain. Genesis records use a known initialization hash (see AUDIT.md).

decision_type.description: Classification of decision according to DECISIONS.md ontology. MUST match constitutional decision types.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the autonomous agent requesting authorization. MUST be unique within deployment.

outcome.description: Decision outcome as defined in SPEC.md. MUST be one of the constitutional outcomes.

context_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the decision context (agent state, action parameters, environmental factors). Enables verification without exposing sensitive data.

policy_version.description: Version identifier of the policy envelope used for evaluation. MUST be semantic version or equivalent.

record_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this record's canonical form (alphabetical keys, no whitespace, UTF-8). Self-integrity verification.

reason.description: Optional: Human-readable explanation for the outcome. Non-normative informational field.

metadata.description: Optional: Implementation-specific metadata. Not included in canonical hash computation.

receipt_version.description: Optional (introduced v2.1): explicit semantic version of the receipt schema this record was produced under. Absence means v1 (pre-v2.1) — verifiers MUST accept absence as v1 for back-compat. Newer-than-known versions MUST be parsed using the additive-only rule (unknown fields are ignored). See docs/protocol/RECEIPT_EVOLUTION.md.

signing_key_id.description: Optional (introduced v2.1): producer-key fingerprint that signed this record's canonical bytes. Lookup is performed against the producer key rotation registry. See docs/protocol/RECEIPT_EVOLUTION.md.

policy_snapshot_fingerprint.description: Optional (introduced v2.1): SHA-256 hex of the canonical bytes of the frozen policy snapshot the decision was gated by. Allows offline verifiers to rehydrate the exact policy environment at decision time. See docs/protocol/RECEIPT_EVOLUTION.md.

payload_hash.description: Optional (introduced v2.1): SHA-256 hex of the canonical decision payload bytes that were signed. Distinct from record_hash, which covers the receipt envelope as a whole.

signature.description: Optional (introduced v2.1): base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical decision payload, produced by the key referenced by signing_key_id.

$comment: v2.1 forward-compatibility: additionalProperties was changed from false to true to satisfy doctrine §14 rule 1 (additive-only, verifiers ignore unknown fields). Canonical-byte rule for record_hash (locked at v1): alphabetical key order, no whitespace, UTF-8 encoding, exclude 'record_hash' and 'metadata' fields. ALL other present fields — including v2.1+ optional fields and any forward-compatible unknown fields — ARE included in the hash. See AUDIT.md §3.2 and docs/protocol/RECEIPT_EVOLUTION.md.
